name: Bacon Rollups
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove crust from bread and flatten bread slices with a rolling pin.
2. Spread bread with cheese spread and roll up in jelly roll style.
3. Cut into thirds and place 1/3 of a strip of bacon around each roll.
4. Secure with a toothpick.
5. Bake on rack, turning once for about 15 minutes at 400°F.
6. Serve hot! Variations: Instead of Old English Cheese, use cream cheese with chives; peanut butter; or cream cheese and horseradish.
